meta.summary: HapHiC allele-aware Hi-C scaffolding for haplotype-resolved and collapsed genome assemblies, including the haphic command, bundled ALLHiC optimization, plotting, refsort, and core utilities.
meta.description: HapHiC allele-aware Hi-C scaffolding for haplotype-resolved and collapsed genome assemblies, including the haphic command, bundled ALLHiC optimization, plotting, refsort, and core utilities.

test: haphic check | grep -F 'sparse_dot_mkl' >/dev/null && haphic pipeline --help | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && haphic sort --help | grep -F 'ALLHiC' >/dev/null && haphic plot --help | grep -F 'alignments' >/dev/null && haphic refsort --help | grep -F 'PAF' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-haphic-utils && cd /tmp/taf-haphic-utils && printf '>ctg1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>ctg2
TTTTCCCCAAAAGGGG
' > asm.fa && mock_agp_file.py asm.fa > asm.agp && grep -F 'ctg1' asm.agp >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-haphic-refsort && cd /tmp/taf-haphic-refsort && printf '>ctg1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>ctg2
TTTTCCCCAAAAGGGG
' > asm.fa && printf 'scaffold_1	1	20	1	W	ctg1	1	20	+
scaffold_1	21	120	2	N	100	scaffold	yes	map
scaffold_1	121	136	3	W	ctg2	1	16	+
' > scaffolds.agp && printf 'ctg1	20	0	20	+	chr1	1000	100	120	20	20	60
ctg2	16	0	16	+	chr1	1000	200	216	16	16	60
' > asm_to_ref.paf && haphic refsort scaffolds.agp asm_to_ref.paf --fasta asm.fa > scaffolds.refsort.agp && test -s scaffolds.refsort.agp && test -s scaffolds.refsort.fa && grep -F 'ctg1' scaffolds.refsort.agp >/dev/null
